scout_drone.name: Scout Drone
scout_drone.description: Tiny hovering mining bot. Nimble, cheap, and expendable.

heavy_drone.name: Heavy Drone
heavy_drone.description: Industrial armoured unit. Slow but hauls massive loads.

refinery_drone.name: Refinery Drone
refinery_drone.description: Autonomous circuit drone. Mines, hauls, and refuels without input.
